NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR FEB-19-2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS WILLIAM FAIDI, TRIBECA COMPANIES, LLC AND CYPRESS MANAGEMENT SOLUTIONS, INCORPORATED'S MOTION TO DISQUALIFY COUNSEL IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF REFILING MOTION. THE MOVING PARTY HAS FAILED TO SHOW THE RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN TRIBECA COMPANIES LLC AND TRIBECA HOLDING LLC AND ALSO FAILED TO SHOW THE RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN TRIBECA HOLDING LLC AND WILLIAM FAIDI. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-01-2013 Vacated

Ntc Of And Amended Mtn To Disqualify Counsel
Off Calendar Feb-08-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS WILLIAM FAIDI, TRIBECA COMPANIES, LLC, CYPRESS MANAGEMENT SOLUTIONS, INC.'S AMENDED MOTION To Disqualify Counsel is off calendar because a dismissal of the entire action was filed on January 18, 2013. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Ntc Of And Amended Mtn To Disqualify Counsel
Off Calendar Dec-20-2012 Continued To Feb-08-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS WILLIAM FAIDI, TRIBECA COMPANIES, LLC and CYPRESS MANAGEMENT SOLUTIONS, INC.'s Amended Motion To Disqualify Counsel is continued to February 8, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 on the Court's own motion. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976.

Mtn To Disqualify Counsel
Off Calendar Nov-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. EDWARD C. SINGER JR. OF ZACKS & FREEDMAN, TEL. NO. 956-8100 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. HORACE W. GREEN OF GREEN & HUMBERT, TEL. NO. 837-5433 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANTS WILLIAM FAIDI, TRIBECA COMPANIES, LLC and CYPRESS MANAGEMENT SOLUTIONS, INCORPORATED'S Motion To Disqualify Counsel is denied without prejudice of refiling motion. The Moving party has failed to show the relationship between Tribeca Companies LLC and Tribeca Holding LLC and also failed to show the relationship between Tribeca Holding LLC and William Faidi. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (302/MJM)
